message:
feat(core,fuse): degradation FSM with hysteresis and FUSE backpressure shedding

Add a formal DegradationLevel enum (Normal/Warning/Degraded/Critical/
Emergency) and DegradationFsm that escalates immediately on worsening
pressure but requires sustained recovery samples before de-escalating,
preventing rapid level oscillation. Introduce BackpressureGate for
per-operation proceed/throttle/shed decisions based on current degradation
level and operation type (read vs write), and PressureMonitor as the
unified entry point combining ComputeBudget CPU sampling with the FSM.

Wire backpressure into the FUSE layer: add optional BackpressureGate to
FuseInner with a with_backpressure() constructor, and insert shed checks
returning EBUSY in all write-path FUSE operations (create, mkdir, unlink,
rmdir, rename, setattr, write) under emergency pressure conditions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
